subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the Truth and risen from the graves of contingent existence! By the life of God, verily the temples of divine unity and the lions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذبون المنبعثون من اجداث الامکان لعمر الله ان هیاکل التوحید و لیوث
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @education and the development of capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
